inputs.label: Number of Cups
inputs.businessContext: Volume of ingredient measured in US customary cups

inputs.label: Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of ingredient in grams per cup (e.g., water ~240, flour ~120, sugar ~200)

inputs.label: Packing Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to account for packing density (e.g., 1 for loose, >1 for packed). Default 1 (loose).

inputs.label: Calibration Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for scale calibration adjustment (e.g., 1.05 for +5% correction). Default 1.
